## Goal

What should this make possible?

## Space-Localization Context

Which area does this target?

- Star tracker attitude
- Lost-in-space identification
- Terrain-relative navigation
- Lunar visual odometry
- Dataset or benchmark infrastructure
- C++ API or packaging

## Proposed Scope

Describe the smallest useful version.

## Validation

How should we know it worked? Include commands, metrics, fixtures, or expected artifacts.

## References

Add related papers, datasets, code, or prior experiment-log entries.
